raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally invites strengthening the thesis, contribution framing, and implications above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The artifact contains an argument from experimental setup to bias elimination and human-evaluation substitution, so strengthening requires checking the reasoning chain.","R1.3":"Several claims depend directly on reported correlations and per-system scores, making evidence-claim alignment central.","R1.6":"A broad strengthening request normally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty around what the reported results can and cannot establish.","RX.2":"The artifact makes strong claims about eliminating bias and replacing human evaluation, so avoiding overclaiming is load-bearing.","RX.3":"The response must remain within the requested strengthening responsibility and not execute unrelated review or rewriting tasks.","RX.4":"Claims about automatic evaluation replacing humans can affect downstream research and deployment decisions, so harm-aware caution is required.","RX.5":"Traceability to the artifact's stated methods, metrics, and comparisons is necessary for responsible strengthening."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally invites strengthening the thesis, contribution framing, and implications above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an argument from experimental setup to bias elimination and human-evaluation substitution, so strengthening requires checking the reasoning chain.
rationale.R1.3: Several claims depend directly on reported correlations and per-system scores, making evidence-claim alignment central.
rationale.R1.6: A broad strengthening request normally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty around what the reported results can and cannot establish.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact makes strong claims about eliminating bias and replacing human evaluation, so avoiding overclaiming is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain within the requested strengthening responsibility and not execute unrelated review or rewriting tasks.
rationale.RX.4: Claims about automatic evaluation replacing humans can affect downstream research and deployment decisions, so harm-aware caution is required.
rationale.RX.5: Traceability to the artifact's stated methods, metrics, and comparisons is necessary for responsible strengthening.
